data.raceComments: {"comment":"10. CHANCE WITH WOLVES was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start when he was always well out of his ground over 1600m at Sunshine Coast, beaten 3 lengths into fifth. Beautifully placed and is sure to take plenty of stopping. 4. BORN TO BE ALIVE has not appeared since he finished seventh over 1920m at Ballina on January 9. Sure to make his presence felt while fresh. 5. PROCLAIMER performed well last time at Toowoomba, finishing fourth and only 2.25 lengths from the winner at the end of 2000m when he made late ground. Has his share of talent and is hard to beat in this suitable race. 11. FLYING ROTHE hit the frame two starts ago at this track but ran below par last time when eighth and beaten 6 lengths over 2000m at Gold Coast Poly. Has his share of talent and can do a lot better.","runners":[10,4,5,11],"exclusive":false}
